string.text: Predators
Night Predators
Herbivores
Zombies
Zombies
Aberrants
Bloodsuckers
Boars
Burers
Chimeras
Controllers
Wild Dogs
Flesh Mutants
Gigants
Psy-Dogs
Pseudodogs
Snorks
Tushkanos
Cats
Fractures
Zombies
Poltergeists
Rats
Karliks
Psysuckers
Lurkers
Heard a #subject_faction# crew came up to recover their dead at #location# after #other_faction# left.
Saw a #subject_faction# crew walk into #location# #ago# to recover their dead from a #other_faction# wipe.
I was near #location# #ago# when a #subject_faction# patrol walked in to ID their dead. They brought back tags and left the bodies.
Tracks at #location# show #other_faction# left clean after a wipe and a #subject_faction# crew came up to recover the dead.
#subject_name# brought a #subject_faction# crew to #location# #ago# to recover the dead from a #other_faction# wipe.
Heard a #subject_species# pack got onto the #other_faction# dead at #location# #ago#.
Saw #subject_species# feeding on the #other_faction# dead at #location# before any recovery crew came up.
I was downwind of #location# #ago# when a #subject_species# pack moved in on the #other_faction# bodies. Nothing was left to identify.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_species# pack came onto the #other_faction# kill before anyone could retrieve.
A #subject_species# pack fed on the #other_faction# dead at #location# #ago# until the bones were picked clean.
Heard a #subject_faction# crew walked onto the #other_faction# dead at #location# #ago# and stripped them clean.
Saw #subject_faction# pulling weapons and gear off the #other_faction# bodies at #location# before any recovery crew came up.
I was near #location# #ago# when a #subject_faction# crew rolled in on the #other_faction# kill. They took everything that wasn't bolted to a corpse.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# came onto the #other_faction# wipe and left with full packs.
#subject_faction# stripped the #other_faction# dead at #location# #ago#. Nothing left worth recovering.
Heard a #subject_faction# crew left #location# #ago# hunting #other_faction# after a sister squad got cut down.
Saw a #subject_faction# revenge crew cutting east on #other_faction# tracks #ago# after their sister squad fell at #location#.
I was near #location# when #other_faction# hit a #subject_faction# squad #ago#. The revenge crew that went after them never came back.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# left a wipe behind and ran east on #other_faction# boots before the bodies cooled.
#subject_name# took a #subject_faction# revenge crew after #other_faction# from #location# #ago#.
Heard a #subject_faction# backup crew came up to retake #location# from #other_faction# #ago#.
Saw a #subject_faction# crew burning fuel toward #location# #ago# to back up the guys holding against #other_faction# at the gate.
I was near #location# #ago# when a #subject_faction# crew came up to back up the gate. They hit #other_faction# but the wall was already down.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# brought another crew up to retake the gate from #other_faction# after the wall fell.
#subject_name# led #subject_faction# backup against #other_faction# at #location# #ago# but the wall came down anyway.
Heard #subject_faction# pulled out of #location# #ago#. #other_faction# hold the gate now.
Saw the last #subject_faction# guns walking out of #location# #ago# before #other_faction# came in through the wire.
I crossed #location# #ago# right as #other_faction# took the wall. #subject_faction# pulled out before the gate fell and burned the records on the way.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# walked out before #other_faction# came in and took the gate without a real fight.
#subject_name# led the last #subject_faction# guns out of #location# #ago# before #other_faction# took the gate.
Heard a new #subject_species# alpha took the pack at #location# #ago#. Old one is dead.
Saw a new #subject_species# bull take the pack at #location# #ago#. Bigger than the one before.
I was on the ridge over #location# #ago# when the #subject_species# pack changed leaders. The new alpha ran two stalkers off before noon.
Tracks at #location# show the #subject_species# pack changed leaders #ago#. The new alpha is heavier than the last.
A new #subject_species# alpha took the pack at #location# #ago#.
Heard the #subject_species# alpha at #location# went down to #other_faction# fire #ago#.
Saw a #other_faction# crew drop the #subject_species# alpha at #location# #ago# before the pack came over the ridge.
I was on the same ridge as #other_faction# when they put the #subject_species# alpha down at #location# #ago#. The pack came up before they could break station.
Tracks at #location# show #other_faction# took down the #subject_species# alpha and the pack ran them across the ridge.
#other_faction# killed the #subject_species# alpha at #location# #ago#. The pack is hunting them.
Heard a #subject_species# pack picked up a #other_faction# blood trail off #location# #ago#.
Saw a #subject_species# pack moving onto a #other_faction# bleeder near #location# #ago#. The trail was still hot.
I was downwind of #location# #ago# when a #subject_species# pack came up on a #other_faction# bleeder. The pack got to him first.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_species# pack tracking a #other_faction# bleeder across the ridge.
A #subject_species# pack closed on a #other_faction# bleeder near #location# #ago#.
Heard a #subject_faction# medic crew rolled out of #location# #ago# for a wounded brother.
Saw a #subject_faction# medic crew running for #location# #ago# after a wounded brother called in over the radio.
I crossed #location# #ago# when a #subject_faction# medic crew ran for a wounded brother. He bled out before they could pull him.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_faction# medic crew came up to a wounded brother bleeding in the brush.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# medic crew to a wounded brother at #location# #ago#.
Heard a #subject_faction# crew chased a #other_faction# carrier out of #location# #ago#.
Saw a #subject_faction# crew running down a #other_faction# stalker carrying an artefact off #location# #ago#.
I was at the trader when #subject_faction# went after a #other_faction# carrier out of #location# #ago#. The artefact never reached the counter.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# closing on a #other_faction# stalker who came out with an artefact.
#subject_name# took a #subject_faction# crew after a #other_faction# carrier out of #location# #ago#.
Heard a #subject_species# pack came up on a #other_faction# carrier off #location# #ago#.
Saw a #subject_species# pack moving on a #other_faction# stalker carrying an artefact out of #location# #ago#.
I was downwind of #location# #ago# when a #subject_species# pack picked up the artefact scent off a #other_faction# carrier and closed quiet.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_species# pack closed on a #other_faction# carrier coming out with an artefact.
A #subject_species# pack tracked a #other_faction# artefact carrier out of #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_faction# emptied a stash near #location# #ago#.
Saw #subject_faction# walking off #location# #ago# with packs heavier than they came in with.
I was checking my own cache when #subject_faction# came past #location# #ago# with gear they had not earned. The stash was empty after.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# came off the trail with a stash that is empty now.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# crew to a stash at #location# #ago# and emptied it.
Heard #subject_faction# planted on a stash at #location# #ago# waiting for the owner to come back.
Saw #subject_faction# at #location# with scopes already on the stash they had set up to ambush.
I almost stepped into it at #location# #ago# when I saw #subject_faction# laying overwatch on a stash. Backed off before they spotted me.
Looks like #subject_faction# set overwatch on the #location# stash and dropped the first looter to come up the trail.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# crew to overwatch on a stash at #location# #ago# and shot the first scavenger up the trail.
Heard #subject_faction# buried a fresh cache near #location# #ago#.
Saw #subject_faction# burying gear near #location# #ago# on a route nobody else was using.
I crossed #subject_faction# tracks near #location# #ago# leading to a fresh dig. They had taken the long way in with heavy packs.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# came in heavy and buried a fresh cache in the brush.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# crew to bury a fresh cache near #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_faction# moved onto #location# #ago# and dug in.
Saw #subject_faction# come into #location# #ago# and hold it before anyone could push back.
I was on the high ground over #location# #ago# when #subject_faction# came in and took it. The map of #level# changed.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# came in #ago# and laid out a watch rotation that has not lifted.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# crew onto #location# #ago# and they have held it since.
Heard #subject_species# moved onto #location# #ago# and dug in.
Saw #subject_species# come into #location# #ago# and hold it before anyone could push them out.
I was on the ridge over #location# #ago# when #subject_species# came in and claimed it. That part of #level# is theirs now.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_species# came in #ago# and have not moved since.
A #subject_species# pack claimed #location# #ago# and they have held it since.
Heard #subject_faction# got a pot going at #location# #ago#.
Saw #subject_faction# at the cookfire at #location# #ago# eating after a long route in.
I was looking for food when I caught the smell off #location# #ago#. #subject_faction# had stew on the coals from a fresh kill.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# came off the trail and built a cookfire before posting any watch.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# crew off the trail to eat at #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_faction# bedded down at #location# #ago# after a long march.
Saw #subject_faction# sleeping at #location# #ago# after two days on the move with no food.
I was looking for shelter when I crossed #subject_faction# already asleep at #location# #ago#. They had been on the move two days.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# came in tired and bedded down without bothering to set a watch.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# crew to sleep at #location# #ago# after a forced march.
Heard #subject_faction# pulled off the trail at #location# #ago# for a halt.
Saw #subject_faction# halted at #location# #ago# for a few minutes before they put the boots back on.
I crossed #subject_faction# resting at #location# #ago# on a long route. They were back on the move before I could finish a smoke.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# halted briefly and moved on before the trail went cold.
#subject_name# called a halt for a #subject_faction# crew at #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_faction# brought wounded to #location# #ago# for a medic.
Saw #subject_faction# carrying bleeders into #location# #ago# with the medic already working before they came in.
I came in to trade and walked into the middle of it #ago#. #subject_faction# had wounded all over the floor at #location#. Two did not make it.
Blood trail to #location# shows #subject_faction# hauled their own in #ago#.
#subject_name# brought #subject_faction# wounded to #location# #ago# with the medic on them.
Heard #subject_faction# barred the doors at #location# #ago# and pulled inside.
Saw #subject_faction# pull inside at #location# #ago# before the storm came over the ridge.
I was looking for shelter when I found #subject_faction# already inside at #location# #ago#. They had the stove going behind barred doors.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# pulled inside #ago# and have not come back out.
#subject_name# took a #subject_faction# crew indoors at #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_faction# dug foxholes on the ridge over #location# #ago# with no plan to come down.
Saw #subject_faction# dug into the ridge above #location# #ago# after they lost the trail to whoever had been tracking them.
I almost stepped into a #subject_faction# foxhole on the ridge over #location# #ago#. They had been dug in for two days without a fire.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# dug into the ridge and have not stirred since they came up.
#subject_name# put a #subject_faction# crew in foxholes on the ridge over #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_faction# walked the anomaly field at #location# #ago# bolt by bolt.
Saw #subject_faction# in the #location# anomalies #ago# with detectors out and bolts in hand.
I was on the ridge over #location# #ago# when #subject_faction# walked the field. Two bolts caught and one stalker did not come back.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# walked every line by bolt before the detector ran out.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# crew through the #location# anomalies #ago# bolt by bolt.
Heard #subject_faction# went hunting near #location# #ago# for whatever the trader pays.
Saw #subject_faction# coming out of #location# #ago# with hides cut from a fresh kill.
I was on the same boar trail when #subject_faction# beat me to it #ago# at #location#. They left blood and offal in the grass.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# tracked a boar and dropped it before sundown.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# crew hunting hides near #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_faction# crowded the trader at #location# #ago#.
Saw #subject_faction# dump packs on the trader counter at #location# #ago# until the till ran low.
I was in line at the trader at #location# #ago# when #subject_faction# came in. They paid out gear for an hour. I waited longer.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_faction# crew unloaded packs at the trader #ago#.
#subject_name# took a #subject_faction# crew to the trader at #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_faction# took the wire at #location# #ago# with two watches deep.
Saw #subject_faction# pull onto the #location# wire #ago# with scopes up and watch posts already set.
I was looking to cut through when I saw #subject_faction# on the #location# wire #ago#. Two watches deep and I went around.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# came up to the wire and have stayed posted since.
#subject_name# put a #subject_faction# crew on the #location# wire #ago#.
Heard #subject_faction# put a recon patrol past #location# #ago#.
Saw a #subject_faction# patrol crossing past #location# #ago# on a long loop nobody asked for.
I crossed a #subject_faction# patrol off #location# #ago# mapping a stretch nobody had paper for. They came back two batteries dead.
Tracks past #location# show a #subject_faction# patrol cut a long loop through new ground #ago#.
#subject_name# took a #subject_faction# patrol past #location# #ago# on a long recon loop.
Heard #subject_faction# set instruments around #location# #ago# and worked the readings late.
Saw #subject_faction# at #location# #ago# with sensors out and the dosimeter ticking through the night.
I crossed the science camp at #location# #ago# when #subject_faction# was running readings. Numbers came back wrong enough to rewrite the last report.
Tracks to #location# show #subject_faction# brought instruments in and have not pulled them out since.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# science crew to #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_faction# stayed at the #location# fire #ago# with a bottle out.
Saw #subject_faction# at the #location# fire #ago# with songs carrying across half of #level#.
I was looking for shelter when I caught the music off #location# #ago#. #subject_faction# had a bottle out and stayed till the songs ran out.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_faction# stayed at the fire late with bottles emptied where they sat.
#subject_name# kept a #subject_faction# crew at the #location# fire #ago# with the bottle going.
Heard #subject_faction# cracked the vodka at #location# #ago# on paycheck night.
Saw #subject_faction# at #location# #ago# with cards on the table and the vodka half empty.
I came in to trade and walked into a paycheck night at #location# #ago#. #subject_faction# was deep in vodka with cards already going.
Music carrying off #location# #ago# tells #subject_faction# is deep into a paycheck night with vodka out.
#subject_name# led a #subject_faction# crew into a paycheck night at #location# #ago#.
Heard a #subject_species# pack came up on a kill at #location# #ago#.
Saw a #subject_species# pack feeding at #location# #ago# after they ran something down through the brush.
I was downwind of #location# #ago# when a #subject_species# pack moved onto a kill. The screaming carried first, then it went quiet.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_species# pack ran something down and fed before moving on.
A #subject_species# pack fed on a kill at #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_species# went down in the den at #location# #ago#.
Saw a #subject_species# pack file back into the den at #location# #ago# at first light.
I crossed past #location# at first light #ago# and the #subject_species# pack had filed back into the den off-cycle till dusk.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_species# pack went down in the den and has not stirred.
A #subject_species# pack went to sleep in the #location# den #ago#.
Heard #subject_species# bedded down in the grass at #location# #ago# without bothering with cover.
Saw a #subject_species# herd settle in open ground at #location# #ago# and not move again.
I came over the rise above #location# #ago# and a #subject_species# herd had bedded down in the grass below me. Wide awake or not, they were not moving.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_species# herd settled in the open and stayed for hours.
A #subject_species# herd bedded down at #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_species# holed up in the shelter at #location# #ago# and would not come out.
Saw a #subject_species# disappear into the shelter at #location# #ago# and the door stayed quiet after.
I passed near #location# #ago# and the shelter there had #subject_species# inside. Whatever was in there was not coming out for me.
Tracks at #location# show #subject_species# went into the shelter and stayed.
#subject_species# took shelter at #location# #ago# and bedded down inside.
Heard #subject_species# cut a long line across #location# #ago# with no heading.
Saw a #subject_species# pack moving past #location# #ago# spread thin and not following a trail.
I was on my way back when I crossed #subject_species# sign near #location# #ago#. The pack had cut a long line through with no pattern anyone could read.
Fresh #subject_species# tracks at #location# #ago# go in a long line nobody can read for heading or pack sign.
A #subject_species# pack roamed across #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_species# gathered at #location# #ago# in numbers that do not happen by accident.
Saw a #subject_species# pack converging at #location# #ago# from every direction at once.
I was on the high ground when the calls started carrying off #location# #ago#. #subject_species# pulled together into a pack bigger than usual.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_species# pack converged from three directions #ago# and stayed together after.
A #subject_species# pack gathered at #location# #ago#.
Heard #subject_species# bolted from #location# #ago# without stopping, and whatever spooked them is still there.
Saw #subject_species# running past me near #location# #ago# scared hard enough to leave scat on the trail.
I was on the trail when a #subject_species# pack came past me #ago# fleeing #location# without a fight in them.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_species# pack ran out in every direction, and whatever drove them off is still there.
A #subject_species# pack scattered from #location# #ago# in every direction.
Heard #subject_species# took #location# for a den #ago#. The pack is growing.
Saw #subject_species# moving into #location# #ago# in numbers that mean they are not leaving.
I was scouting the corner when #subject_species# came into #location# #ago# and dug in. That part of #level# is theirs now.
Tracks at #location# show a #subject_species# pack settled in and has been breeding since they came up.
A #subject_species# pack claimed #location# for a den #ago#.
